name: mozaika
author: Mozaika (mozaika.design)
description: 548 real-product design systems, decoded and measured from live sites — install any as a shadcn theme. The measured cure for the generic shadcn look: real color roles, real font stacks, real radius. `npx shadcn add https://mozaika.design/r/<name>`
